title: betula alba subsp. odorata
intro: Betula alba subsp. odorata, also known as Silver Birch, is a subspecies of the Betula alba tree, a deciduous tree native to Europe and Asia. The bark and leaves of the Silver Birch possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Betula alba subsp. odorata include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating digestive problems. Betula alba subsp. odorata is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, as well as in traditional folk medicine to promote overall well-being.
